languages.text: "Из меня плохой рассказчик, но как изволит Ваше Благородие". {n}Яруб заметно мрачнеет.{/n} "Каждый из нас, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}, грешен перед {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богом-Императором{/g}, и грешен крепко. Кровью смываем грехи, погибая за человечество. Даже если тех грехов — самая малость, смерть во славу Золотого Трона ждет каждого в нашем полку". {n}Он ежится, словно от внезапного холода.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Из меня плохой рассказчик, но как изволит Ваше Благородие". {n}Яруб заметно мрачнеет.{/n} "Каждый из нас, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}, грешен перед {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богом-Императором{/g}, и грешен крепко. Кровью смываем грехи, погибая за человечество. Даже если тех грехов — самая малость, смерть во славу Золотого Трона ждет каждого в нашем полку". {n}Он ежится, словно от внезапного холода.{/n}

languages.text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

Кровью смываем грехи, погибая за человечество. Даже если тех грехов — самая малость, смерть во славу Золотого Трона ждет каждого в нашем полку". {n}Он ежится, словно от внезапного холода.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us Merovians is guilty before the Emperor, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

languages.text: «Lo mío no es contar historias, pero, si mi{mf|lord|lady} insiste...». {n}La expresión de Jarub se ensombrece.{/n} «Todos los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} somos culpables ante el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, muy culpables. Limpiamos nuestros errores con sangre y morimos por la Humanidad. Aunque la ofensa haya sido de poca monta, al regimiento al completo le espera una gloriosa muerte por el Trono Dorado». {n}Se estremece como si le hubiera dado un escalofrío.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Lo mío no es contar historias, pero, si mi{mf|lord|lady} insiste...». {n}La expresión de Jarub se ensombrece.{/n} «Todos los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} somos culpables ante el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, muy culpables. Limpiamos nuestros errores con sangre y morimos por la Humanidad. Aunque la ofensa haya sido de poca monta, al regimiento al completo le espera una gloriosa muerte por el Trono Dorado». {n}Se estremece como si le hubiera dado un escalofrío.{/n}

languages.text: “我不太会讲故事，但大人坚持的话……”{n}雅鲁布的表情阴沉下来。{/n}“我们每个{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}，在{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}面前都是罪人，罪孽深重。我们用鲜血洗刷恶行，为人类战死。不管罪行多么轻微，进了我们军团，就注定要为黄金王座的荣耀战死。”{n}他仿佛突然感受到寒意，打了个寒颤。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我不太会讲故事，但大人坚持的话……”{n}雅鲁布的表情阴沉下来。{/n}“我们每个{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}，在{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}面前都是罪人，罪孽深重。我们用鲜血洗刷恶行，为人类战死。不管罪行多么轻微，进了我们军团，就注定要为黄金王座的荣耀战死。”{n}他仿佛突然感受到寒意，打了个寒颤。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'expression de Jarub s'assombrit.{/n} « J'ai jamais été un grand causeur, mais puisque vous insistez, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}... Aux yeux de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, nous autres {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g}, on est tous coupables d'une faute impardonnable. Alors, on lave nos péchés dans le sang, en sacrifiant nos vies pour l'humanité. Si insignifiants soient nos crimes, on est tous promis à mourir pour la plus grande gloire du Trône d'Or. » {n}Il frémit subitement comme si un vent glacial venait de se lever.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'expression de Jarub s'assombrit.{/n} « J'ai jamais été un grand causeur, mais puisque vous insistez, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}... Aux yeux de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, nous autres {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g}, on est tous coupables d'une faute impardonnable. Alors, on lave nos péchés dans le sang, en sacrifiant nos vies pour l'humanité. Si insignifiants soient nos crimes, on est tous promis à mourir pour la plus grande gloire du Trône d'Or. » {n}Il frémit subitement comme si un vent glacial venait de se lever.{/n}

languages.text: "Pek iyi bir anlatıcı değilimdir ama {mf|lordum|leydim} madem ısrar ediyor." {n}Jarub'un ifadesi kararıyor.{/n} "Biz {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovluların{/g} her biri {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} huzurunda suçludur, hem de çok suçludur. Kötü amellerimizi kanla, İnsanlık için ölerek temizleriz. Suç ne kadar küçük olursa olsun... Altın Taht'ın şanı için ölmek, alayımızdaki herkesin kaderidir." {n}Sanki aniden üşümüş gibi titriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Pek iyi bir anlatıcı değilimdir ama {mf|lordum|leydim} madem ısrar ediyor." {n}Jarub'un ifadesi kararıyor.{/n} "Biz {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovluların{/g} her biri {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} huzurunda suçludur, hem de çok suçludur. Kötü amellerimizi kanla, İnsanlık için ölerek temizleriz. Suç ne kadar küçük olursa olsun... Altın Taht'ın şanı için ölmek, alayımızdaki herkesin kaderidir." {n}Sanki aniden üşümüş gibi titriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich bin kein großer Erzähler, aber wenn {mf|Mylord|Mylady} darauf bestehen." {n}Jarubs Miene verdüstert sich.{/n} "Jeder von uns {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianern{/g} ist vor dem {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} schuldig, schrecklich schuldig. Wir waschen uns mit Blut von unseren Taten rein und sterben für die Menschheit. Egal, wie belanglos das Vergehen auch war, in unserem Regiment erwartet jeden der Tod für den Rum des Goldenen Throns." {n}Er schaudert, als würde er plötzlich frieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin kein großer Erzähler, aber wenn {mf|Mylord|Mylady} darauf bestehen." {n}Jarubs Miene verdüstert sich.{/n} "Jeder von uns {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianern{/g} ist vor dem {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} schuldig, schrecklich schuldig. Wir waschen uns mit Blut von unseren Taten rein und sterben für die Menschheit. Egal, wie belanglos das Vergehen auch war, in unserem Regiment erwartet jeden der Tod für den Rum des Goldenen Throns." {n}Er schaudert, als würde er plötzlich frieren.{/n}

languages.text: 「私は大した話者ではありませんが、もし私の{mf|主|女主人}が強く望むのなら。」{n}ジャラブの表情が暗くなる.{/n}「我々{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メロヴィアン{/g}は皆、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の前に罪を犯している。恐ろしく罪を犯している。我々は血で我々の悪行を洗い流し、人類のために死ぬ。どんな小さな罪であろうと、我々の連隊にいる者は皆、黄金の王座の栄光のために死を待つ。」{n}彼は突然の寒気のように震える.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I'm no great storyteller, but if my {mf|lord|lady} insists." {n}Jarub's expression darkens.{/n} "Every one of us {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} is guilty before the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, terribly guilty. We wash away our wicked deeds with blood, dying for Humanity. No matter how petty the offence, death for the glory of the Golden Throne awaits everyone in our regiment." {n}He shivers as if from a sudden chill.{/n}
